headline: Why One Brazil Fund Opened an $11 Million Position in MercadoLibre Despite a Steep One-Year Stock Drop
summary: MercadoLibre delivers e-commerce and fintech solutions across Latin America, generating over $31 billion in annual revenue.

headline: America's Greatest Opportunities: Priceline's Run Came From Unique Offering
summary: Priceline stock collapsed during the 2000 major market plunge but its unique service led to dramatic earnings growth.

headline: Thai travelers' behavior shifts toward short-haul destinations during the May holiday: Agoda
summary: Thai travelers are increasingly favoring short-distance, easy-to-plan getaways, reflecting a growing preference for trips that require less time and effort to organize, according to search data from digital travel platform Agoda.
